title: Thinking and feeling about novelty: How cognition and emotion shape investment in novel ideas
abstract: Abstract While prior research on the strategic framing of innovation highlights the cognitive mechanisms underlying novelty evaluation, we know little about the corresponding emotional mechanisms. Drawing on appraisal theory, construal level theory, and the literature on emotions, we theorize two distinct appraisal‐emotion pathways through which the framing of novel ideas evokes hope and awe among investors with different motives. We argue that high‐construal framing supplements economically motivated investors' low‐level feasibility orientation, which evokes hope and increases their willingness to invest. By contrast, low‐construal framing supplements non‐economically motivated investors' high‐level desirability orientation, which evokes awe and increases their willingness to invest. We test and find some support for these within‐motive pathways across three studies. Our study offers new theoretical and practical insights on the strategic framing of novel ideas.
title_cn: 思考与感受新颖性：认知与情感如何影响对新想法的投资
abstract_cn: 摘要 以往关于创新战略框架的研究强调了新颖性评估背后的认知机制，但我们对相应的情感机制知之甚少。基于评估理论、构念层次理论以及情感文献，我们理论化了两条不同的评估-情感路径，通过这些路径，新颖想法的框架能够在具有不同动机的投资者中引发希望和敬畏。我们认为，高层次构念框架补充了经济动机投资者的低层次可行性导向，从而引发希望并增加他们的投资意愿。相反，低层次构念框架补充了非经济动机投资者的高层次可取性导向，从而引发敬畏并增加他们的投资意愿。我们在三项研究中进行了测试，并发现对这些动机内路径有一定的支持。我们的研究为新颖想法的战略框架提供了新的理论和实践见解。

title: Do Carbon Emissions Affect Stock Returns? Causal Evidence from a Supreme Court Ruling
abstract: Considering the importance of corporate carbon emissions, the Supreme Court of the United States ruled against the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) and curtailed EPA’s regulatory powers by unprecedentedly invoking the “major questions doctrine” in its judgment of West Virginia v. EPA in 2022. We find that the stock prices of firms with greater exposure to carbon risk increased relative to firms with lower exposure after the Supreme Court verdict. The results are more pronounced for firms subject to higher federal climate enforcement intensity prior to the court ruling. Long-term climate commitments by state governments and carbon-sensitive institutional investors attenuate the effect. Both cash flow and discount rate contribute to the climate risk effect in firm value. Overall, our findings from this landmark climate litigation suggest that climate transition risks can affect stock prices. This paper was accepted by Lin William Cong, finance. Funding: Funding support by Hong Kong General Research Fund [Grant 17501825] is gratefully acknowledged. This work was supported by National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72172082 and 72342021 (C. Shan)]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06732 .
title_cn: 碳排放是否影响股票回报？来自最高法院裁决的因果证据
abstract_cn: 考虑到企业碳排放的重要性，美国最高法院在2022年对西弗吉尼亚州诉环保署案的裁决中，裁定反对环境保护署（EPA），并通过前所未有地引用“重大问题原则”来限制EPA的监管权力。我们发现，裁决后，面临更大碳风险的公司的股票价格相对于面临较低碳风险的公司有所上升。对于在法院裁决前受到更高联邦气候执法强度影响的公司，这一结果更加明显。各州政府的长期气候承诺和对碳敏感的机构投资者减弱了这一效应。现金流和折现率均对公司价值中的气候风险效应有所贡献。总体而言，我们在这一具有里程碑意义的气候诉讼中的发现表明，气候转型风险可以影响股票价格。本文由林威廉·孔（Lin William Cong）接受，研究领域为金融。资助：感谢香港一般研究基金[资助号17501825]的支持。本研究得到了中国国家自然科学基金[资助号72172082和72342021（C. Shan）]的支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06732获取。

title: Private Equity, Consumers, and Competition: Evidence from the Nursing Home Industry
abstract: This paper studies how product market competition shapes the impact of private equity (PE) acquisitions on consumers. We examine nursing home buyouts and observe that PE-owned facilities exhibit greater competitive sensitivity: competing more aggressively when competitive incentives are strong and exploiting market power more aggressively when competitive incentives are weak. We find that PE-owned facilities are more sensitive to local market competition—even when comparing effects only across facilities purchased as part of the same acquisition—and are more responsive to a pro-competitive policy helping consumers compare facilities. This suggests that regulators should attend to the competitive sensitivity of acquirers and the concentration of markets where acquisitions occur, as well as consider pro-competitive policies to mitigate or even reverse PE’s potentially adverse consequences. This paper was accepted by Carrie Chan, healthcare management. Funding: This work was supported by the UCLA Price Center for Entrepreneurship and Innovation and the UCLA Fink Center for Finance and Investment. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01486 .
title_cn: 私募股权、消费者与竞争：来自养老院行业的证据
abstract_cn: 本文研究了产品市场竞争如何影响私募股权（PE）收购对消费者的影响。我们考察了养老院的收购情况，观察到PE拥有的设施表现出更强的竞争敏感性：在竞争激励强烈时更加积极竞争，而在竞争激励较弱时则更积极地利用市场权力。我们发现，PE拥有的设施对当地市场竞争的敏感性更高——即使仅在同一收购中购买的设施之间进行比较——并且对有助于消费者比较设施的促进竞争政策反应更为积极。这表明，监管机构应关注收购者的竞争敏感性以及收购发生市场的集中度，同时考虑促进竞争的政策，以减轻甚至逆转PE可能带来的不利后果。本文由Carrie Chan接受，涉及医疗管理。资助：本研究得到了加州大学洛杉矶分校创业与创新普赖斯中心和加州大学洛杉矶分校芬克金融与投资中心的支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01486获取。

title: EXPRESS: Will Machines Take Over? Algorithms for Human-Machine Collaborative Decision Making in Healthcare
abstract: Despite significant advancements in predictive artificial intelligence (AI), organizations continue to grapple with determining the most effective integration of AI into their operations, particularly in combining AI with human capabilities in task execution. This paper introduces a diagnostic system aimed at minimizing costs while maintaining patient safety in hospitals by efficiently allocating mammography interpretation tasks between AI algorithms and radiologists. The optimal diagnostic system employs algorithm-generated risk scores for mammograms to determine if additional assessment by a radiologist is necessary. It evaluates the costs of two approaches—automation, where AI completely replaces human interpretation, and delegation, where AI and radiologists share interpretation tasks–compared to the current expert-alone strategy. When AI performance does not exceed that of radiologists, the optimal design is a simple two-threshold policy: AI recommends no follow-up for low-risk cases, recommends follow-up for high-risk cases, and delegates ambiguous cases in between to radiologists; the thresholds are analytically derived and state-independent. This two-threshold policy is state-independent and that optimal thresholds are not contingent on the diagnostic system’s prior history. We demonstrate our system’s performance by back-testing against real-life scenarios, utilizing data from a mammography AI contest and real-world cost and performance metrics. Backtesting demonstrates potential cost savings of up to 20.9% compared to the expert-alone approach. Beyond radiology imaging, our work holds significant implications for the design of workflows in the AI era and human-machine collaboration contexts.
topics: Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare and Education
title_cn: 机器会接管吗？医疗保健中人机协作决策的算法
abstract_cn: 尽管预测人工智能（AI）取得了显著进展，组织在确定如何将AI有效整合到其运营中，尤其是在任务执行中将AI与人类能力结合方面，仍然面临挑战。本文介绍了一种诊断系统，旨在通过在AI算法与放射科医生之间有效分配乳腺X光检查解读任务，来最小化成本同时保持医院患者安全。该最优诊断系统利用算法生成的乳腺X光检查风险评分来判断是否需要放射科医生进行额外评估。它评估了两种方法的成本——自动化，即AI完全取代人工解读，以及委托，即AI与放射科医生共享解读任务——与当前的专家单独策略进行比较。当AI的表现未超过放射科医生时，最优设计为简单的双阈值政策：AI对低风险病例不推荐后续检查，对高风险病例推荐后续检查，并将中间模糊病例委托给放射科医生；这些阈值是通过分析推导的，并且与状态无关。该双阈值政策是状态无关的，最优阈值不依赖于诊断系统的历史记录。我们通过对真实场景进行回测来展示系统的性能，利用来自乳腺X光AI竞赛的数据以及现实世界的成本和性能指标。回测结果显示，与专家单独方法相比，潜在的成本节省可达20.9%。除了放射影像学，我们的研究对AI时代和人机协作背景下的工作流程设计具有重要意义。

title: To Adopt or Not: The Paradox of AR Fitting Technology in Retail Channels
abstract: As brick-and-mortar retail rebounds, congestion in fitting rooms has reemerged as a critical operational challenge. Augmented reality (AR) fitting applications offer a scalable solution by enabling rapid virtual trials and reducing in-store delays, yet imperfect assessments may increase product mismatches. This study provides actionable guidance for retailers on AR adoption and pricing strategies by clarifying the economic roles of the substitution and complementarity effects. Our findings underscore the importance of a market-contingent approach to AR adoption and system upgrades. Rather than presuming that improvements in accuracy or usability will uniformly enhance performance, retailers and IT managers should rigorously evaluate how technological capabilities interact with market size, price fluctuations, and congestion dynamics. We also inform targeted marketing by demonstrating how heterogeneity in consumer technology preferences shapes channel selection and effective transaction outcomes. More broadly, our results caution policymakers that emerging digital technologies—while intended to reduce friction—may generate unintended welfare losses if mismatch risks and strategic responses are overlooked. These insights provide actionable guidance for digital transformation initiatives in retail and other capacity-constrained service systems characterized by heterogeneous consumers.
title_cn: 采用还是不采用：零售渠道中增强现实试衣技术的悖论
abstract_cn: 随着实体零售的复苏，试衣间的拥堵再次成为一个关键的运营挑战。增强现实（AR）试衣应用提供了一种可扩展的解决方案，通过快速的虚拟试穿来减少店内延误，但不完美的评估可能会增加产品不匹配的风险。本研究通过阐明替代效应和互补效应的经济角色，为零售商在AR采纳和定价策略方面提供了可行的指导。我们的研究结果强调了基于市场情况的AR采纳和系统升级的重要性。零售商和IT经理不应假设准确性或可用性的提升会均匀地提高绩效，而应严格评估技术能力如何与市场规模、价格波动和拥堵动态相互作用。我们还通过展示消费者技术偏好的异质性如何影响渠道选择和有效交易结果，来为有针对性的市场营销提供信息。更广泛地说，我们的结果提醒政策制定者，尽管新兴数字技术旨在减少摩擦，但如果忽视不匹配风险和战略响应，可能会产生意想不到的福利损失。这些见解为零售及其他以异质消费者为特征的容量受限服务系统中的数字转型倡议提供了可行的指导。

title: More Can Be Less: The Economics of Answer Viewing on Paid Q&A Platforms
abstract: Paid Q&A platforms increasingly experiment with an answer-viewing feature that allows users to pay a small fee to access answers already given to others. At first glance, this model appears to expand access and create new revenue streams. Our research, however, shows that the reality is more complex. Using a game-theoretic model, we demonstrate that answer viewing can sometimes harm platform profits due to market cannibalization: Users who might have paid for personalized answers switch to cheaper viewing options. Surprisingly, we find that answerers may raise their consulting fees when platforms share a large portion of viewing revenue with them, and users do not always benefit because personalized answers become more expensive. These results reveal a central paradox—more can be less—as adding another monetization channel may backfire. For practice, our findings highlight the need for Q&A platforms to carefully calibrate revenue-sharing policies to avoid undermining their core market. For policy, the study underscores the importance of safeguards to protect small knowledge providers when platform incentives diverge from those of answerers and users. Beyond Q&A, the insights apply to broader contexts where platforms repackage personalized services into standardized products.
title_cn: 更多可能是更少：付费问答平台上答案查看的经济学
abstract_cn: 付费问答平台越来越多地尝试一种答案查看功能，允许用户支付少量费用以访问已经提供给其他用户的答案。乍一看，这种模式似乎扩大了访问权限并创造了新的收入来源。然而，我们的研究表明，现实情况更为复杂。通过使用博弈论模型，我们证明答案查看有时会因市场蚕食而损害平台利润：那些本可能为个性化答案付费的用户转向了更便宜的查看选项。令人惊讶的是，我们发现当平台与回答者分享大量查看收入时，回答者可能会提高他们的咨询费用，而用户并不总是受益，因为个性化答案变得更加昂贵。这些结果揭示了一个核心悖论——更多可能意味着更少——因为增加另一个货币化渠道可能适得其反。对于实践而言，我们的发现强调了问答平台需要仔细调整收入分享政策，以避免削弱其核心市场。对于政策而言，本研究强调了在平台激励与回答者和用户的激励出现分歧时，保护小型知识提供者的重要性。超越问答领域，这些见解适用于更广泛的背景，即平台将个性化服务重新包装为标准化产品的情况。

title: Other People’s Children: How Diversity Without Inclusion Impacts Community Support for Public Schools
abstract: Organizations pursuing activities that advance the public interest often require support from their local communities, but such support may be harder to come by in more racially diverse communities. In this study, we argue that this negative effect of racial diversity on support for organizations serving the public interest will be weaker the more inclusive the community, especially where community inclusion is accompanied by shared values among members of different groups and where the organizations themselves are racially representative. We test and find support for these predictions by looking at one specific type of public service organization: public schools in the United States. Specifically, we find that community support for public schools—both generally in terms of local spending per pupil and specifically as the bond amounts residents vote to approve—is negatively associated with racial diversity within a school district, but this negative relation only holds for less inclusive communities where members of different groups are less likely to live close to each other or to have social ties with each other. We further find that this moderating effect of community inclusion is complemented by shared values and organizational representativeness, so that diversity has the most negative effect in less inclusive communities where members of different races differ in their political beliefs and schools are relatively segregated, and no significant effect in inclusive communities with shared values and integrated schools. Our study sheds new light on the conditions under which organizations seeking to address grand challenges can benefit from strong community support. Funding: This work was supported by the Carlson School of Management [DEI Research Grant] and the Responsible Research in Business and Management [Dare to Care Scholorship]. Supplemental Material: The online appendices are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.19351 .
title_cn: 他人的孩子：缺乏包容的多样性如何影响社区对公立学校的支持
abstract_cn: 追求促进公共利益活动的组织往往需要当地社区的支持，但在种族多样性较高的社区中，这种支持可能更难获得。在本研究中，我们认为，种族多样性对支持服务公共利益组织的负面影响在社区包容性更强时会减弱，尤其是在社区包容性伴随不同群体成员之间的共同价值观以及组织本身具有种族代表性的情况下。我们通过研究美国的一种特定类型的公共服务组织——公立学校，来检验并支持这些预测。具体而言，我们发现，社区对公立学校的支持——无论是就每个学生的地方支出而言，还是居民投票批准的债券金额而言——与学区内的种族多样性呈负相关，但这种负相关关系仅在包容性较差的社区中成立，在这些社区中，不同群体的成员更不可能住得很近或拥有社会联系。我们进一步发现，社区包容性的调节效应与共同价值观和组织代表性相辅相成，因此，在包容性较差的社区中，不同种族成员在政治信仰上存在差异且学校相对隔离时，种族多样性对支持的负面影响最为显著，而在具有共同价值观和融合学校的包容性社区中则没有显著影响。我们的研究为寻求解决重大挑战的组织在何种条件下能够获得强大的社区支持提供了新的视角。资助：本研究得到了卡尔森管理学院[DEI研究资助]和负责任的商业与管理研究[敢于关心奖学金]的支持。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.19351获取。

title: Waiting for the Right Offer: Laboratory Evidence on How News Affects Bargaining
abstract: We conduct a series of laboratory experiments to examine whether the gradual exogenous revelation of sellers’ private information influences the occurrence of trades in a bilateral bargaining setting with a static lemon condition. We find that, although information does not increase efficiency, it reduces the likelihood that buyers incur losses when trading with low-quality sellers. Anticipating that additional signals will arrive, buyers hesitate to finalize deals immediately and exhibit a “waiting for news” effect, making sizable offer adjustments only when sufficient positive signals have accumulated. In contrast, informed sellers are less sensitive to news but appear to wait for the offer that they deem acceptable. This paper was accepted by Dorothea Kübler, behavioral economics and decision analysis. Funding: T. Ding initiated this project while at the Shanghai University of Finance and Economics and thanks the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grant 72173076] for financial support. S. F. Lehrer thanks the Social Science and Humanities Research Council of Canada for research support. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.07224 .
title_cn: 等待合适的提议：关于新闻如何影响谈判的实验室证据
abstract_cn: 我们进行了一系列实验室实验，以考察卖方私人信息的逐步外生揭示是否会影响在静态柠檬条件下双边讨价还价环境中的交易发生。我们发现，尽管信息并未提高效率，但它降低了买方在与低质量卖方交易时遭受损失的可能性。由于预期会有更多信号到来，买方在立即达成交易时表现出犹豫，出现了“等待消息”的效应，只有在积累了足够的正面信号后才会进行较大的报价调整。相比之下，知情的卖方对消息的敏感度较低，但似乎会等待他们认为可接受的报价。本文由多萝西娅·库布勒（Dorothea Kübler）接受，涉及行为经济学和决策分析。资助信息：丁涛（T. Ding）在上海财经大学发起了该项目，并感谢中国国家自然科学基金[资助号72173076]的财务支持。S. F. 莱赫尔（S. F. Lehrer）感谢加拿大社会科学与人文学科研究委员会的研究支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.07224获取。

title: Beyond O(T) Regret: Decoupling Learning and Decision Making in Online Linear Programming
abstract: Breaking the [Formula: see text] Barrier in Online Linear Programming How can fast first-order methods for online linear programming (OLP) match the performance of more computationally intensive LP-based approaches? In the paper “Beyond [Formula: see text] Regret: Decoupling Learning and Decision Making in Online Linear Programming,” the authors develop a new framework that improves the regret guarantees of scalable first-order algorithms for online linear programming. They show that when the dual problem satisfies a mild error bound condition, first-order methods can achieve [Formula: see text] regret, including [Formula: see text] in continuous support settings and [Formula: see text] in finite support settings. The key insight is to decouple learning and decision making. The algorithm first learns an approximate dual solution and then localizes decisions to a neighborhood around that solution using an adaptive procedure. This decoupling narrows the gap between efficient gradient-based methods and LP-based benchmarks, providing strong theoretical guarantees while maintaining scalability for applications such as revenue management, online advertising, and cloud computing.
title_cn: 超越O(T)遗憾：在在线线性规划中解耦学习与决策制定
abstract_cn: 突破在线线性规划中的[公式：见文本]限制 快速的一阶方法如何能够在在线线性规划（OLP）中与更为计算密集型的基于线性规划的方法相匹配？在论文《超越[公式：见文本]后悔：在线线性规划中学习与决策的解耦》中，作者们提出了一个新的框架，改善了可扩展的一阶算法在在线线性规划中的后悔保证。他们展示了当对偶问题满足弱误差界限条件时，一阶方法可以达到[公式：见文本]的后悔，包括在连续支撑条件下的[公式：见文本]和在有限支撑条件下的[公式：见文本]。关键的洞察是将学习与决策进行解耦。算法首先学习一个近似的对偶解，然后使用自适应程序将决策局限于该解附近的一个邻域。这个解耦缩小了高效基于梯度的方法与基于线性规划的基准之间的差距，提供了强有力的理论保证，同时保持了在收益管理、在线广告和云计算等应用中的可扩展性。

title: EXPRESS: Waiting Time Externality Awareness in Socially Responsible Queueing
abstract: In service systems, customers tend to overutilize resources, resulting in high congestion. We study a noncoercive way to alleviate congestion based on customers’ awareness of the negative waiting externalities they impose. To this end, we revisit Naor’s rational-queue model by adding a term that captures the cost a customer associates with the waiting time generated for other customers encountered during their sojourn. First, we show that this modification preserves the threshold structure of customers’ joining strategy. Using lattice-path counting techniques, we derive a closedform expression for the expected generated waiting time, conditional on the number of customers observed upon arrival. The generated wait is increasing and concave in the queue length at arrival. Viewing expected waiting time as allocated across arrivals, the queue length associated with an arbitrary unit of expected generated waiting time is first-order stochastically lower than the queue length associated with a unit of expected personal waiting time. We prove that the maximum generated wait is increasing and convex in the joining threshold and provide tight bounds with exact light/heavy traffic asymptotics. Internalizing social awareness (weight on generated wait) lowers the joining threshold and reduces waiting; in high-demand regimes, it can also increase social welfare. When the operator can also influence the weight on personal wait, that lever reduces congestion more strongly than waiting externality awareness. Finally, we quantify the awareness level needed to reach Naor’s social threshold and show that it is lowest at a non-extreme demand level.
title_cn: 表达：社会责任排队中的等待时间外部性意识
abstract_cn: 在服务系统中，客户往往会过度利用资源，从而导致高拥堵。我们研究了一种非强制性的方法来缓解拥堵，基于客户对其造成的负面等待外部性的认知。为此，我们重新审视了Naor的理性排队模型，通过添加一个项来捕捉客户与其在逗留期间为其他客户产生的等待时间相关的成本。首先，我们证明了这一修改保持了客户加入策略的阈值结构。利用格路径计数技术，我们推导出了在到达时观察到的客户数量条件下，期望生成等待时间的封闭形式表达式。生成的等待时间随着到达时的队列长度增加而增加并且是凹的。将期望等待时间视为在到达之间分配，与任意单位的期望生成等待时间相关的队列长度，在概率上是比与单位期望个人等待时间相关的队列长度要低的。我们证明了最大生成等待时间在加入阈值上是递增和凸的，并提供了与确切轻/重交通渐近值相符的紧密界限。内化社会意识（对生成等待的权重）降低了加入阈值并减少了等待；在高需求情况下，这也可以提高社会福利。当运营者能够影响个人等待的权重时，该杠杆比等待外部性意识更强地降低拥堵。最后，我们量化了实现Naor社会阈值所需的意识水平，并显示在非极端需求水平下这是最低的。

title: EXPRESS: Scheduling Additive Manufacturing Systems: Complexity and Algorithms to Minimize the Number of Late Parts
abstract: Additive Manufacturing (AM) is a process by which three-dimensional products are made via the addition of material in a layer-by-layer fashion. This manufacturing technique is growing in commercial usage given its advantages in creating very dense or complex geometries as well as highly customizable components. In healthcare, for example, AM can be used to improve patient outcomes by providing timely medical devices (or parts) required for treatments. Minimizing the number of late parts in this context will directly improve the patients’ welfare. This paper studies the nesting and scheduling problem within the AM context and shows the problem of minimizing the number of late parts is strongly NP-hard even if the nesting of parts-into-jobs is given. We also develop efficient algorithms to minimize the number of late parts, both when nesting is fixed beforehand and when nesting is part of the algorithm. The theoretical results, including algorithm performance bounds, developed in this paper are new contributions to the literature. An extensive computational study evaluates the performance of both algorithms. The nesting and scheduling algorithm performs within 7% of the lower bound on average and shows an effective way to nest and schedule systems containing challenging problem instances. Providing efficient, high-performing algorithms such as these will allow AM managers to quickly schedule parts for AM production with a minimum number of late parts and consequently improve both customer satisfaction and profitability of the firm.
title_cn: 表达：调度增材制造系统：降低晚点零件数量的复杂性与算法
abstract_cn: 增材制造（AM）是一种通过逐层添加材料来制造三维产品的过程。这种制造技术因其在创建非常密集或复杂的几何形状以及高度可定制的组件方面的优势而在商业使用中不断增长。在医疗领域，例如，增材制造可以通过提供治疗所需的及时医疗设备（或部件）来改善患者的治疗结果。在这种情况下，减少迟交部件的数量将直接提升患者的福利。本文研究了增材制造背景下的嵌套与调度问题，并证明了即使给定部件到作业的嵌套，最小化迟交部件数量的问题仍然是强NP难题。我们还开发了有效的算法，以减少迟交部件的数量，既适用于预先固定嵌套的情况，也适用于嵌套作为算法的一部分的情况。论文中提出的理论结果，包括算法性能界限，是对文献的新贡献。此外，广泛的计算研究评估了这两种算法的性能。嵌套与调度算法在平均情况下的表现与下界相差7%，并展示了针对具有挑战性问题实例的嵌套和调度系统的有效方法。提供像这样的高效、高性能算法将使增材制造管理者能够快速调度AM生产的部件，最小化迟交部件的数量，从而提高客户满意度和公司的盈利能力。

title: The duality of duality: Generative and disruptive climate configurations for innovation
abstract: Organizational climate is seen as a key driver of organizational performance, including sustained innovation. However, there is limited work on the effects of climate duality on innovation. The co-existence of two distinct climate dimensions (duality) in an organization creates the potential for both generative and disruptive dualities. By dividing the innovation process into an idea generation stage and an innovation implementation stage, we develop a theory linking climate duality and the generative–disruptive dichotomy at each stage of the innovation process. In particular, we argue that climate duality should be generative at the idea stage and disruptive at the implementation stage. Using data from the 2018 Australian Public Service Employee Census ( N = 59,870), we test the distinct effects of climate duality at each stage. We conclude with a discussion of the implications of these findings for theories of work climate and innovation. • Advance workplace climate research with a configurational approach examining interactions among multiple workplace climates • Theorize relationship between duality (co-existence of go-getter and inclusive climates) and stages of innovation process • Use Australian Public Service Employee Census to show climate duality benefits idea generation (a divergent process) • Find climate duality hinders implementation (a convergent process), revealing paradoxical effects on innovation • Extend theories of climate duality and innovation to public organizations, contributing to cross-sector understanding
title_cn: 双重性的双重性：创新的生成性和颠覆性气候配置
abstract_cn: 组织气候被视为组织绩效的关键驱动因素，包括持续创新。然而，关于气候二元性对创新影响的研究相对有限。组织内两个不同气候维度的共存（二元性）为生成性和破坏性双重性创造了潜在可能性。通过将创新过程分为构思阶段和实施阶段，我们发展了一个理论，将气候二元性与创新过程每个阶段的生成性-破坏性二分法联系起来。我们特别认为，气候二元性在构思阶段应表现为生成性，而在实施阶段应表现为破坏性。利用2018年澳大利亚公共服务员工普查的数据（N = 59,870），我们检验了气候二元性在每个阶段的独特影响。最后，我们讨论了这些发现对工作气候和创新理论的意义。 • 通过配置方法推进工作场所气候研究，考察多种工作场所气候之间的互动 • 理论化二元性（追求型气候与包容型气候的共存）与创新过程各阶段之间的关系 • 利用澳大利亚公共服务员工普查数据展示气候二元性有利于构思生成（一个发散过程） • 发现气候二元性阻碍实施（一个聚合过程），揭示对创新的悖论性影响 • 将气候二元性和创新理论扩展至公共组织，为跨部门理解做出贡献。

title: Pathways to upscaling: aligning capabilities with supply chain design in automotive manufacturing
abstract: Purpose Taking innovation to scale and accelerating the development of new technologies puts pressure on manufacturers to perform frequent ramp-ups in increasingly volatile markets. Such pressures inevitably bring the role of supply chain right at the centre of the challenge to design supply chains that are ready to upscale. This research aims to explore how manufacturers can design their supply chain and deploy the required capabilities to respond to the upscaling demands. Design/methodology/approach Drawing on the dynamic capabilities (DCs) theory, this study develops a conceptual framework which is validated through multiple case studies. Data was collected and analysed from 14 upscaling projects in automotive manufacturing. Findings This study identified specific DCs (e.g. dynamic relational capabilities) that manufacturers deployed in their upscaling projects, explored their micro-foundations, showed how these are coupled with different supply chain designs (SCDs) and how those matches evolve over time. A distinctive finding is the need for automotive manufacturers involved in innovative and technological upscaling projects, to move away from the traditional binary SCD choice (i.e. modular vs integral) to a less rigid SCD which we called “evolving SCD” and proved to be particularly valuable for companies with limited resources and evolving market positions. Practical implications This research outlines actionable pathways for upscaling and offers guidance on aligning SCD with capabilities. The findings also illustrate how managers can leverage temporal configurational shifts to strategically address evolving priorities from initial market entry concerns like IP protection and capability access, to later-stage challenges around supplier reliability and volume capacity. Originality/value This study introduces the concept of the evolving SCD which is particularly suitable for start-up companies in meeting the upscaling requirements. This research enriches the understanding on how to manage upscaling projects by offering fresh empirical insights into how manufacturers can successfully upscale by streamlining the SCD with capabilities.
title_cn: 扩大规模的途径：在汽车制造中将能力与供应链设计对齐
abstract_cn: 目的：将创新扩大规模并加速新技术的发展，使制造商在日益波动的市场中面临频繁增产的压力。这种压力不可避免地将供应链的角色置于设计准备好扩展的供应链挑战的中心。此次研究旨在探讨制造商如何设计其供应链并部署所需的能力，以应对扩展需求。设计/方法论：本研究基于动态能力（DCs）理论，开发了一个概念框架，并通过多个案例研究进行了验证。数据采集和分析来自14个汽车制造领域的扩展项目。发现：本研究识别出了制造商在扩展项目中部署的具体动态能力（例如，动态关系能力），探讨了其微观基础，展示了这些能力与不同的供应链设计（SCD）如何结合，以及这些匹配如何随时间演变。一个显著的发现是参与创新和技术扩展项目的汽车制造商需要摆脱传统的二元供应链设计选择（即模块化与整体化），转向一种不那么严苛的供应链设计，我们称之为“演变型供应链设计”，该设计对于资源有限和市场位置变化的公司尤其有价值。实践意义：本研究概述了可行的扩展路径，并提供了关于将供应链设计与能力对齐的指导。研究结果还展示了管理者如何利用时间上的配置变化，战略性地应对从最初市场进入时关注的知识产权保护和能力获取，到后期阶段围绕供应商可靠性和产能等挑战的演变优先事项。原创性/价值：本研究引入了演变型供应链设计的概念，这种设计特别适合初创公司满足扩展要求。此次研究丰富了对如何管理扩展项目的理解，提供了新的实证见解，说明制造商如何通过将供应链设计与能力精简对接，从而成功实现扩展。

title: Battlelines of Accountability: The Discursive Production of Digital Responsibility
abstract: Abstract Public inquiries have become pivotal arenas in which the ethical responsibilities of digital platforms are publicly constructed and contested. Yet scholarship has paid limited attention to the linguistic mechanisms through which these contests unfold. This paper examines the 2024 Australian Joint Select Committee on Social Media and Australian Society as a high-stakes moral forum in which technology firms, regulators, and civil society actors engage in discursive struggles over adolescent harm and platform responsibility. Drawing on a qualitative analysis of more than 3000 pages of submissions and hearing transcripts, we show that accountability in this setting is not simply revealed but actively produced through language. Extending prior research on dialogic accountability, we incorporate Searle’s speech act theory to identify how presuppositions and indirect speech acts function as micro-level tools for shaping epistemic contests about what harms occur and responsibility contests about who ought to be held to account. Our findings demonstrate that corporate actors often deploy these linguistic devices to maintain ambiguity, diffuse blame, or perform symbolic responsibility, while legislators and advocates use them to assert duties, establish harms, and press for substantive accountability. We argue that “digital responsibility” emerges as a contingent discursive accomplishment rather than an intrinsic organizational property, highlighting the performative and strategic nature of ethical claims in contemporary platform governance. By theorizing accountability as a linguistically mediated moral practice, the paper advances business ethics scholarship on discursive legitimation, contributing to ongoing debates about how societies should evaluate and regulate the conduct of powerful digital firms.
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 问责的战线：数字责任的论述生产
abstract_cn: 摘要 公众调查已成为数字平台伦理责任被公开构建和争议的重要场所。然而，学术界对这些争议展开的语言机制关注有限。本文考察了2024年澳大利亚社交媒体和澳大利亚社会联合特别委员会，作为一个高风险的道德论坛，技术公司、监管机构和公民社会参与者在其中就青少年伤害和平台责任展开话语斗争。基于对3000多页提交材料和听证会记录的定性分析，我们展示了在这一背景下的问责制并非简单被揭示，而是通过语言积极产生的。我们扩展了关于对话式问责的先前研究，将Searle的言语行为理论融入其中，以识别预设和间接言语行为如何作为微观层面的工具，塑造关于发生何种伤害及谁应被追究责任的认识论争夺。我们的发现表明，企业行为者往往利用这些语言手段维持模糊性、分散责任或表演象征性的责任，而立法者和倡导者则利用它们主张职责、确立伤害并推动实质性问责。我们认为，“数字责任”作为一种依赖于话语的成果而非内在于组织的属性出现，突显了当代平台治理中伦理主张的表演性和战略性。通过将问责理论化为一种语言介导的道德实践，本文推动了关于话语合法化的商业伦理研究，为关于社会应如何评估和监管强大数字公司的行为的持续讨论做出了贡献。
